title: Reviewer package for public-subset cross-dataset validation and calibration transfer of chest radiograph classification models
description: Code, configuration files, derived metadata, patient-level split files, prediction CSVs, metric tables, manuscript-ready figures, package-version records, training logs, and model checkpoint release assets for a selected-public-subset NIH ChestX-ray14 to VinDr-CXR validation study. Raw NIH ChestX-ray14 and VinDr-CXR images are not redistributed and must be obtained from the original dataset providers.
notes: Before final publication, replace the GitHub-account creator metadata with the final author list if required by the target journal or repository policy. This record does not redistribute raw third-party chest radiograph images.
